positive: A highly stylized, mystical nocturnal scene featuring interconnected geometric botanical elements and glowing bioluminescent fauna. The central composition is dominated by a detailed, elegant crescent moon intertwined with winding roots and stylized vines. Subtly incorporated is a constellation pattern of gentle, glowing orbs and minimalist celestial shapes. Style is 'Neo-Art Nouveau meets Cosmic Minimalism,' using flat color blocking, strong, clean silhouettes, and hard edges. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, cyan, gold leaf accents, and phosphorescent lime green. Perfect negative space and central placement are crucial for printing on apparel. High contrast, clean vector graphic aesthetic, centered composition, perfect print resolution.
negative: text, words, letters, signatures, logo, watermark, signature, artifact, grainy, messy, smudge, blurry, blur, low detail, grayscale, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise
